title: Speedboat Charter in Marbella: Costs, Seasons and Tips for 2026
html:
Renting a speedboat in Marbella offers a thrilling way to explore the Costa del Sol, with departures from Puerto Banús and prices starting around €350 for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners, making it easy to compare options and secure the perfect vessel for your itinerary.

Where to set off in Marbella

The main departure points are Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina lined with superyachts and boutiques, and Marbella’s Club del Mar, a quieter launch spot. From there, you can head south to Cabo Pino or east towards the Calahonda coastline. Many charters include a stop at the iconic Isla de las Palomas in the Bay of Marbella, a popular swimming anchorage just 4 nautical miles offshore.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (6, 8m) Best for couples or small groups, up to 6 guests, from €350 for a half-day.
  2. Speedboat (8, 10m) Ideal for water sports and coastal exploring, 8 guests, from €550 half-day.
  3. Luxury day cruiser (10, 14m) Comfortable seating and a sundeck, for up to 10 guests, from €1,200 half-day.
  4. Crewed yacht (15m+) Full crew and catering, 12+ guests, from €2,500 half-day. See the Maiora 26m for hire for a premium example.
  5. Catamaran (20m+) Spacious deck and stable ride, ideal for larger parties, from €3,000 half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices depend on vessel size, season, and whether you add a crew or extra services. Below are typical price bands for 2026, all in EUR.

  • Shared tour (2 hours): €70, €120 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €350, €600
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €2,500, €4,500
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (8 hours): €4,000, €8,000

To compare exact rates, browse boats for your dates on the platform; many listings show instant availability and per-day pricing.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Marbella?

EU nationals require the PPER licence for boats over 15 metres or 24 metres in length, but smaller speedboats (under 15m) can be rented without a licence from most operators. The key regulation is the Spanish Maritime Law, which mandates a licence for powered vessels exceeding 15 metres. However, for typical speedboats of 6 to 10 metres, no licence is needed. Always confirm with the operator, as requirements can vary. The warm season runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind offers calm seas ideal for speedboating.

For a quieter experience, book your speedboat in late May or early June, before the peak crowds arrive, when the sea is already warm and the anchorages are peaceful.

At a glance

  • Price band: €350, €8,000 per trip
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: Half-day (4h) or full-day (8h)
  • Capacity: 6, 12+ guests (unlicensed boats up to 10 people)
  • Currency: EUR

Practical booking tips

When booking through BoatHire24, each listing includes a description, photos, and user reviews. You can filter by boat size, capacity, and price. For questions about deposits, cancellations, and insurance, refer to the booking FAQ on the site.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a speedboat for just an hour in Marbella?

Most operators offer minimum two-hour charters, though some speedboat rentals can be booked for one hour if shared with other groups.

What is the best area to anchor near Marbella?

The Bay of Marbella and the waters off Cabopino are popular, with clear water and easy access to beach clubs.

Are there any hidden fees when booking through BoatHire24?

Prices shown include the boat hire and basic equipment; fuel and skipper fees are usually extra unless stated.

What happens if the weather is bad on my booking day?

Operators typically offer a full refund or rescheduling if conditions are deemed unsafe by the marina authorities.

Whichever vessel you choose, the 2026 season promises sunny days and sparkling seas. If you own a speedboat or yacht in Marbella, you can list it on BoatHire24 and reach thousands of travellers. Check availability and start planning your trip today.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
